sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66570" key="mesw|do/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεσῳδ-ός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n66570.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">portion of a choral ode, coming between</tr_> the strophe and antistrophe, without anything to correspond with it, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> </bibl> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Poëm.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:7:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
